assumptions.statement: Enterprise customers can complete onboarding without assisted data migration.
assumptions.evidence: Stakeholder workshop stated this as a target outcome but provided no usage data.
assumptions.validation_action: Review last 20 enterprise onboarding tickets and migration requests.

assumptions.statement: The current service exposes onboarding events needed by the new dashboard.
assumptions.evidence: events/onboarding.py defines account_created and data_import_completed events.
assumptions.validation_action: No action required until event contract changes.

assumptions.statement: The program must use Firebase as the only persistence layer.
assumptions.evidence: Architecture decision ADR-003 approves Supabase for operational analytics.
assumptions.validation_action: Update planning docs to remove Firebase-only constraint.

assumptions.statement: Marketing can supply localized onboarding copy before launch freeze.
assumptions.evidence: Launch plan names Marketing as owner but has no due date.
assumptions.validation_action: Request copy freeze date from Marketing lead.

contradictions.description: Firebase-only persistence conflicts with ADR-003 Supabase analytics approval.
contradictions.resolution_action: Treat A-003 as invalidated and update architecture assumptions.

decision_links.decision: Decide whether assisted migration remains in launch scope.

validation_queue.action: Review onboarding tickets and quantify migration demand.

warnings.message: 50% of entries use [ASSUMPTION]; do not ship implementation scope until high-impact open assumptions are validated.
